jobs.title: (80 - 100%) Senior Power Electronics Engineer
jobs.description: At ABB , we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world. This position reports to: Chapter Leader Power Electronics & APM __ In this role, you will have the opportunity to contribute to ABB’s success with technology, software, product, and system development. Each day, you will identify and implement innovative solutions to relevant problems. You will also showcase your expertise by providing ideas and by being able to work both independently and as a part of a Research & Development (R&D) team. You will join an agile, cross‑functional team of approximately 8–15 employees focused on designing and developing new products. This role is contributing to the Power Protection/EL/SP/R&D in Switzerland. The work model for the role is: On Site You will be mainly accountable for: - Working as an independent and reliable contributor in R&D projects with limited supervision. - Understanding and applying applicable processes, standards, guidelines, and requirements, including architectural and design constraints. - Driving the achievement of assigned targets (quality, time, scope, cost) and raising and addressing risks. - Design and develop power converters - Specify components and define technical requirements with suppliers - Support the overall design cycle of the new product, from simulation to validation and documentation, through design and test - Conduct and coordinate complex analyses, develop recommendations based on technology/engineering practices and business considerations - Support operations and after sales organization during trouble shooting phases - Plan and coordinate a range of complex technology/engineering activities Qualifications for the role: - Master in Electrical/Electronics Engineering with thesis in Power Electronics or Bachelors Degree in Electrical/Electronics and equivalent work experience - 6+ years of electrical engineering experience - Experience with power electronic design topologies, knowledge of UPS technology and familiarity with the power protection - Mastering simulation tools -MATLAB/Simulink, LT Spice- and programming language -C- - Good communication skills in English, both oral and written. Other languages are an asset - Significant experience in working within complex organization - Willingness to travel occasionally (10%) More about us ABB Smart Power provides energy distribution solutions for data centers, industrial and manufacturing plants, critical infrastructure and commercial buildings. The Division’s technical teams work closely with industry partners, delivering advanced solutions that support rapid growth, energy transition, and sustainability objectives. The Division’s portfolio includes industrial circuit breakers, low-voltage systems, motor starting applications, and safety devices like switches and relays. Its Power Protection unit supports the world’s largest data center companies with advanced energy-efficient UPS solutions. The Division’s ABB Ability™ Energy Manager provides a scalable, easy-to-use platform that helps organizations save energy and reduce CO2 emissions. We look forward to receiving your application. If you want to discover more about ABB, take another look at our website www.abb.com. Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. That's why we welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences. Ready to make an impact? Apply today or visit https://www.abb.com to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

descriptionByLocale.it: In ABB aiutiamo le industrie a operare in modo più snello e pulito—e ogni persona qui contribuisce a farlo accadere. Avrai la possibilità di guidare, sarai supportato nella crescita e sarai orgoglioso dell'impatto che creiamo insieme. Unisciti a noi e aiuta a gestire ciò che muove il mondo. Questa posizione riporta a: Chapter Leader Power Electronics & APM __ In questo ruolo avrai l'opportunità di contribuire al successo di ABB con tecnologia, software, prodotto e sviluppo di sistemi. Ogni giorno identificherai e implementerai soluzioni innovative a problemi rilevanti. Metterai in mostra la tua esperienza fornendo idee e lavorando sia in modo autonomo sia come parte di un team di Ricerca & Sviluppo (R&D). Ti unirai a un team agile e cross‑funzionale di circa 8–15 dipendenti focalizzato sulla progettazione e sviluppo di nuovi prodotti. Questo ruolo contribuisce a Power Protection/EL/SP/R&D in Svizzera. Il modello di lavoro per il ruolo è: On Site. Sarai principalmente responsabile di: - Lavorare come collaboratore indipendente e affidabile in progetti R&D con supervisione limitata. - Comprendere e applicare processi, standard, linee guida e requisiti applicabili, inclusi vincoli architetturali e di progettazione. - Guidare il raggiungimento degli obiettivi assegnati (qualità, tempo, ambito, costo) e segnalare e gestire i rischi. - Progettare e sviluppare convertitori di potenza. - Specificare componenti e definire requisiti tecnici con i fornitori. - Supportare l'intero ciclo di progettazione del nuovo prodotto, dalla simulazione alla validazione e documentazione, passando per design e test. - Condurre e coordinare analisi complesse, sviluppare raccomandazioni basate su pratiche tecnologiche/ingegneristiche e considerazioni di business. - Supportare le operazioni e l'organizzazione post‑vendita durante le fasi di troubleshooting. - Pianificare e coordinare una serie di attività tecnologiche/ingegneristiche complesse. Qualifiche per il ruolo: - Laurea Magistrale in Ingegneria Elettrica/Elettronica con tesi in Elettronica di Potenza o Laurea Triennale in Ingegneria Elettrica/Elettronica ed esperienza lavorativa equivalente. - Oltre 6 anni di esperienza in ingegneria elettrica. - Esperienza con topologie di progettazione di elettronica di potenza, conoscenza della tecnologia UPS e familiarità con la protezione di potenza. - Padronanza di strumenti di simulazione – MATLAB/Simulink, LTspice – e del linguaggio di programmazione C. - Buone capacità comunicative in inglese, sia orale che scritto. Altre lingue sono un vantaggio. - Esperienza significativa nel lavoro all'interno di organizzazioni complesse. - Disponibilità a viaggiare occasionalmente (10%). Di più su di noi: ABB Smart Power fornisce soluzioni di distribuzione energetica per data center, impianti industriali e manifatturieri, infrastrutture critiche e edifici commerciali. I team tecnici della Divisione collaborano strettamente con partner industriali, offrendo soluzioni avanzate che supportano la crescita rapida, la transizione energetica e gli obiettivi di sostenibilità. Il portafoglio della Divisione comprende interruttori industriali, sistemi a bassa tensione, applicazioni di avviamento motori e dispositivi di sicurezza come interruttori e relè. L'unità Power Protection supporta le più grandi aziende di data center al mondo con soluzioni UPS avanzate ed efficienti dal punto di vista energetico. L'ABB Ability™ Energy Manager della Divisione offre una piattaforma scalabile e facile da usare che aiuta le organizzazioni a risparmiare energia e a ridurre le emissioni di CO2. Attendiamo con interesse la tua candidatura. Se vuoi scoprire di più su ABB, visita il nostro sito web www.abb.com. Costruire un futuro più pulito e più intelligente richiede tutti i tipi di menti: curiosi, coraggiosi e creativi. Per questo accogliamo persone di ogni background ed esperienza. Pronto a fare la differenza? Candidati oggi o visita https://www.abb.com per saperne di più sull'impatto delle nostre soluzioni in tutto il mondo.
descriptionByLocale.de: Bei ABB helfen wir Industrien, schlanker und sauberer zu arbeiten – und jede Person hier macht das möglich. Sie erhalten die Befugnis zu führen, werden bei Ihrer Weiterentwicklung unterstützt und sind stolz auf die Wirkung, die wir gemeinsam erzielen. Werden Sie Teil unseres Teams und helfen Sie dabei, das zu betreiben, was die Welt antreibt. Diese Position berichtet an: Chapter Leader Power Electronics & APM __ In dieser Rolle haben Sie die Möglichkeit, zum Erfolg von ABB mit Technologie, Software, Produkt- und Systementwicklung beizutragen. Jeden Tag identifizieren und implementieren Sie innovative Lösungen für relevante Probleme. Sie zeigen Ihre Expertise, indem Sie Ideen einbringen und sowohl eigenständig als auch im Rahmen eines Forschungs‑ und Entwicklungsteams (R&D) arbeiten. Sie werden Teil eines agilen, funktionsübergreifenden Teams von etwa 8–15 Mitarbeitenden, das sich auf die Konstruktion und Entwicklung neuer Produkte konzentriert. Diese Rolle trägt zu Power Protection/EL/SP/R&D in der Schweiz bei. Das Arbeitsmodell für die Position ist: Vor Ort. Sie sind hauptsächlich verantwortlich für: - Unabhängiges und zuverlässiges Mitwirken an R&D‑Projekten mit begrenzter Aufsicht. - Verständnis und Anwendung geltender Prozesse, Standards, Richtlinien und Anforderungen, einschließlich architektonischer und gestalterischer Vorgaben. - Vorantreiben der Erreichung zugewiesener Ziele (Qualität, Zeit, Umfang, Kosten) sowie das Erkennen und Angehen von Risiken. - Entwurf und Entwicklung von Stromwandlern. - Spezifikation von Bauteilen und Definition technischer Anforderungen mit Lieferanten. - Unterstützung des gesamten Designzyklus des neuen Produkts, von der Simulation über Validierung und Dokumentation bis hin zu Design und Test. - Durchführung und Koordination komplexer Analysen, Entwicklung von Empfehlungen basierend auf Technologie‑/Ingenieur‑praktiken und geschäftlichen Überlegungen. - Unterstützung von Betrieb und After‑Sales‑Organisation während Fehlersuchphasen. - Planung und Koordination einer Reihe komplexer Technologie‑/Ingenieur‑Aktivitäten. Qualifikationen für die Rolle: - Master in Elektrotechnik/Elektronik mit Abschlussarbeit in Leistungselektronik oder Bachelor in Elektrotechnik/Elektronik und gleichwertige Berufserfahrung. - Mehr als 6 Jahre Erfahrung in der Elektrotechnik. - Erfahrung mit Topologien der Leistungselektronik, Kenntnis der USV‑Technologie und Vertrautheit mit dem Leistungs­schutz. - Beherrschung von Simulationswerkzeugen – MATLAB/Simulink, LTspice – und der Programmiersprache C. - Gute Kommunikationsfähigkeiten in Englisch, sowohl mündlich als auch schriftlich. Weitere Sprachen sind von Vorteil. - Umfangreiche Erfahrung in der Arbeit innerhalb komplexer Organisationen. - Bereitschaft zu gelegentlichen Reisen (10%). Mehr über uns: ABB Smart Power bietet Energieverteilungslösungen für Rechenzentren, Industrie‑ und Fertigungsanlagen, kritische Infrastrukturen und Geschäftsgebäude. Die technischen Teams der Division arbeiten eng mit Industriepartnern zusammen und liefern fortschrittliche Lösungen, die schnelles Wachstum, die Energiewende und Nachhaltigkeitsziele unterstützen. Das Portfolio der Division umfasst industrielle Leistungsschalter, Niederspannungssysteme, Motoranlaufanwendungen und Sicherheitsgeräte wie Schalter und Relais. Die Power‑Protection‑Einheit unterstützt die weltweit größten Rechenzentrumsunternehmen mit fortschrittlichen, energieeffizienten USV‑Lösungen. Der ABB Ability™ Energy Manager der Division bietet eine skalierbare, benutzerfreundliche Plattform, die Organisationen hilft, Energie zu sparen und CO₂‑Emissionen zu reduzieren. Wir freuen uns auf Ihre Bewerbung. Wenn Sie mehr über ABB erfahren möchten, besuchen Sie unsere Website www.abb.com. Eine sauberere, intelligentere Zukunft erfordert alle Arten von Köpfen: die Neugierigen, die Mutigen und die Kreativen. Deshalb heißen wir Menschen aus allen Hintergründen und mit allen Erfahrungen willkommen. Bereit, etwas zu bewegen? Bewerben Sie sich noch heute oder besuchen Sie https://www.abb.com, um mehr über die Wirkung unserer Lösungen weltweit zu erfahren.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Chez ABB, nous aidons les industries à fonctionner de manière plus allégée et plus propre – et chaque personne ici contribue à le rendre possible. Vous serez habilité à diriger, soutenu dans votre évolution et fier de l'impact que nous créons ensemble. Rejoignez‑nous et aidez à faire fonctionner ce qui fait tourner le monde. Ce poste dépend de : Chapter Leader Power Electronics & APM __ Dans ce rôle, vous aurez l'opportunité de contribuer au succès d'ABB grâce à la technologie, aux logiciels, aux produits et au développement de systèmes. Chaque jour, vous identifierez et mettrez en œuvre des solutions innovantes à des problèmes pertinents. Vous démontrerez votre expertise en proposant des idées et en travaillant à la fois de façon autonome et au sein d'une équipe de Recherche & Développement (R&D). Vous rejoindrez une équipe agile et interfonctionnelle d'environ 8 à 15 collaborateurs, axée sur la conception et le développement de nouveaux produits. Ce rôle contribue à Power Protection/EL/SP/R&D en Suisse. Le modèle de travail pour le poste est : sur site. Vous serez principalement responsable de : - Travailler comme contributeur indépendant et fiable sur des projets R&D avec une supervision limitée. - Comprendre et appliquer les processus, normes, directives et exigences applicables, y compris les contraintes architecturales et de conception. - Piloter l'atteinte des objectifs assignés (qualité, délai, portée, coût) et identifier et gérer les risques. - Concevoir et développer des convertisseurs de puissance. - Spécifier les composants et définir les exigences techniques avec les fournisseurs. - Soutenir le cycle complet de conception du nouveau produit, de la simulation à la validation et à la documentation, en passant par la conception et les tests. - Réaliser et coordonner des analyses complexes, formuler des recommandations basées sur les pratiques technologiques/ingénierie et les considérations commerciales. - Soutenir les opérations et l'organisation après‑vente pendant les phases de dépannage. - Planifier et coordonner une série d'activités technologiques/ingénierie complexes. Qualifications pour le poste : - Master en génie électrique/électronique avec mémoire en électronique de puissance ou licence en génie électrique/électronique et expérience professionnelle équivalente. - Plus de 6 ans d'expérience en ingénierie électrique. - Expérience des topologies de conception d'électronique de puissance, connaissance de la technologie UPS et familiarité avec la protection de puissance. - Maîtrise des outils de simulation – MATLAB/Simulink, LTspice – et du langage de programmation C. - Bonnes compétences en communication en anglais, à l'oral comme à l'écrit. D'autres langues sont un atout. - Expérience significative au sein d'organisations complexes. - Disponibilité à voyager occasionnellement (10%). En savoir plus sur nous : ABB Smart Power fournit des solutions de distribution d'énergie pour les centres de données, les usines industrielles et de fabrication, les infrastructures critiques et les bâtiments commerciaux. Les équipes techniques de la division travaillent en étroite collaboration avec les partenaires industriels, offrant des solutions avancées qui soutiennent la croissance rapide, la transition énergétique et les objectifs de durabilité. Le portefeuille de la division comprend des disjoncteurs industriels, des systèmes basse tension, des applications de démarrage de moteurs et des dispositifs de sécurité tels que des interrupteurs et des relais. Son unité Power Protection soutient les plus grandes entreprises de centres de données du monde avec des solutions UPS avancées et économes en énergie. L'ABB Ability™ Energy Manager de la division propose une plateforme évolutive et facile d'utilisation qui aide les organisations à économiser de l'énergie et à réduire les émissions de CO₂. Nous attendons votre candidature avec impatience. Si vous souhaitez en savoir plus sur ABB, consultez notre site web www.abb.com. Construire un avenir plus propre et plus intelligent nécessite toutes sortes d'esprits : les curieux, les courageux et les créatifs. C'est pourquoi nous accueillons les personnes de tous horizons et expériences. Prêt à faire la différence ? Postulez dès aujourd'hui ou visitez https://www.abb.com pour en savoir plus sur l'impact de nos solutions à travers le monde.

jobs.title: Shift leader Assemblaggio / Imballo (80-100%)
jobs.description: At ABB , we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world. This position reports to: Production Supervisor __ Job Summary Contributes to ensuring a safe working environment in compliance with company guidelines, guaranteeing the achievement of Production targets during the shift. Supports the Production Supervisors in the daily coordination of operational activities, providing technical assistance to operators in the assembly and packaging areas. The work model for this role is on-site: #LI-Onsite Main Roles and Responsibilities - Monitoring and ensuring compliance with ABB safety guidelines and Code of Conduct during the shift - Supporting the Production Supervisor / Logistics Supervisor to ensure the correct execution of production activities - Providing technical support to operators (Assembly, Packaging) during daily operations - Acting as the reference point for on‑the‑job training of production personnel - Serving as the first level of contact for operational issues to be escalated to the relevant Production Supervisor - Participating in Level 1 Q Circles by gathering technical and quality issues and communicating them to the appropriate supervisor License to Operate / Core Values - Ensuring that all personnel (within the area of responsibility) understand ABB’s core values and the group’s safety and integrity standards, and acting accordingly - Implementing and ensuring compliance with ABB’s Code of Conduct, tools, policies, and processes within the assigned area Collaboration / Leadership - Promoting and enabling collaboration within the relevant work areas - Managing relationships with stakeholders in the area of responsibility and ensures alignment Professional Skills and Experience - Minimum 2–3 years of experience in operations, with experience in coordination roles - Experience in the electromechanical field - Previous experience in team coordination roles is considered a plus Education - Vocational school diploma or equivalent More About Us ABB Smart Power provides energy distribution solutions for data centers, industrial and manufacturing plants, critical infrastructure and commercial buildings. The Division’s technical teams work closely with industry partners, delivering advanced solutions that support rapid growth, energy transition, and sustainability objectives. The Division’s portfolio includes industrial circuit breakers, low-voltage systems, motor starting applications, and safety devices like switches and relays. Its Power Protection unit supports the world’s largest data center companies with advanced energy-efficient UPS solutions. The Division’s ABB Ability™ Energy Manager provides a scalable, easy-to-use platform that helps organizations save energy and reduce CO2 emissions. The recruitment process is managed by Mara Werne, Talent Partner . Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. That's why we welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences. Ready to make an impact? Apply today or visit https://www.abb.com to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

descriptionByLocale.it: In ABB, aiutiamo le industrie a operare in modo più efficiente e sostenibile—e ogni persona qui contribuisce a realizzarlo. Avrai l'opportunità di guidare, il supporto per crescere e l'orgoglio di creare un impatto insieme. Unisciti a noi e aiuta a far funzionare ciò che fa girare il mondo. Questa posizione riporta a: Supervisore di Produzione __ Descrizione del lavoro __ Contribuisce a garantire un ambiente di lavoro sicuro in conformità con le linee guida aziendali, assicurando il raggiungimento degli obiettivi di produzione durante il turno. Supporta i Supervisori di Produzione nel coordinamento quotidiano delle attività operative, fornendo assistenza tecnica agli operatori nelle aree di assemblaggio e imballaggio. Il modello di lavoro per questa posizione è in sede: #LI-Onsite __ Principali ruoli e responsabilità __ - Monitorare e garantire il rispetto delle linee guida di sicurezza ABB e del Codice di Condotta durante il turno - Supportare il Supervisore di Produzione / Supervisore Logistica per garantire la corretta esecuzione delle attività produttive - Fornire supporto tecnico agli operatori (Assemblaggio, Imballo) durante le operazioni quotidiane - Agire come punto di riferimento per la formazione sul lavoro del personale di produzione - Servire come primo livello di contatto per questioni operative da segnalare al Supervisore di Produzione pertinente - Partecipare ai Level 1 Q Circles raccogliendo problemi tecnici e di qualità e comunicandoli al supervisore appropriato __ Licenza per operare / Valori fondamentali __ - Garantire che tutto il personale (nell'area di responsabilità) comprenda i valori fondamentali di ABB e gli standard di sicurezza e integrità del gruppo, agendo di conseguenza - Implementare e garantire il rispetto del Codice di Condotta, degli strumenti, delle politiche e dei processi ABB nell'area assegnata __ Collaborazione / Leadership __ - Promuovere e favorire la collaborazione nelle aree di lavoro pertinenti - Gestire le relazioni con gli stakeholder nell'area di responsabilità e garantire l'allineamento __ Competenze professionali ed esperienza __ - Minimo 2–3 anni di esperienza in operazioni, con esperienza in ruoli di coordinamento - Esperienza nel settore elettromeccanico - Precedente esperienza in ruoli di coordinamento del team è considerata un plus __ Formazione __ - Diploma di scuola professionale o equivalente __ Maggiori informazioni su di noi __ ABB Smart Power fornisce soluzioni di distribuzione energetica per data center, impianti industriali e manifatturieri, infrastrutture critiche e edifici commerciali. I team tecnici della Divisione lavorano a stretto contatto con i partner industriali, offrendo soluzioni avanzate che supportano la crescita rapida, la transizione energetica e gli obiettivi di sostenibilità. Il portfolio della Divisione include interruttori industriali, sistemi a bassa tensione, applicazioni di avviamento motori e dispositivi di sicurezza come interruttori e relè. La sua unità Power Protection supporta le più grandi aziende di data center del mondo con soluzioni UPS avanzate ed efficienti dal punto di vista energetico. L'ABB Ability™ Energy Manager della Divisione offre una piattaforma scalabile e facile da usare che aiuta le organizzazioni a risparmiare energia e ridurre le emissioni di CO2. Il processo di reclutamento è gestito da Mara Werne, Talent Partner. Costruire un futuro più pulito e intelligente richiede menti di ogni tipo: curiose, coraggiose e creative. Ecco perché accogliamo persone di tutti i background e esperienze. Pronto a fare la differenza? Candidati oggi o visita https://www.abb.com per saperne di più sull'impatto delle nostre soluzioni in tutto il mondo.
descriptionByLocale.de: Bei ABB helfen wir Industrien, effizienter und umweltfreundlicher zu arbeiten—und jede Person hier trägt dazu bei. Sie werden befähigt zu führen, unterstützt zu wachsen und stolz auf die Wirkung sein, die wir gemeinsam schaffen. Werden Sie Teil unseres Teams und helfen Sie dabei, das zu betreiben, was die Welt antreibt. Diese Position berichtet an: Produktionsleiter __ Stellenbeschreibung __ Trägt dazu bei, ein sicheres Arbeitsumfeld gemäß den Unternehmensrichtlinien zu gewährleisten und die Produktionsziele während der Schicht zu erreichen. Unterstützt die Produktionsleiter bei der täglichen Koordination der operativen Aktivitäten und bietet technische Unterstützung für die Mitarbeiter in den Montage- und Verpackungsbereichen. Das Arbeitsmodell für diese Rolle ist vor Ort: #LI-Onsite __ Hauptaufgaben und Verantwortlichkeiten __ - Überwachung und Sicherstellung der Einhaltung der ABB-Sicherheitsrichtlinien und des Verhaltenskodex während der Schicht - Unterstützung des Produktionsleiters / Logistikleiters bei der korrekten Durchführung der Produktionsaktivitäten - Technische Unterstützung für Mitarbeiter (Montage, Verpackung) während der täglichen Abläufe - Als Ansprechpartner für die Schulung von Produktionspersonal am Arbeitsplatz fungieren - Erster Ansprechpartner für operative Probleme, die an den zuständigen Produktionsleiter weitergeleitet werden müssen - Teilnahme an Level 1 Q Circles durch Sammlung technischer und qualitativer Probleme und deren Kommunikation an den entsprechenden Vorgesetzten __ Betriebserlaubnis / Grundwerte __ - Sicherstellen, dass alle Mitarbeiter (im Verantwortungsbereich) die Grundwerte von ABB sowie die Sicherheits- und Integritätsstandards der Gruppe verstehen und entsprechend handeln - Umsetzung und Sicherstellung der Einhaltung des ABB-Verhaltenskodex, der Tools, Richtlinien und Prozesse im zugewiesenen Bereich __ Zusammenarbeit / Führung __ - Förderung und Ermöglichung der Zusammenarbeit in den relevanten Arbeitsbereichen - Beziehungen zu Stakeholdern im Verantwortungsbereich pflegen und Ausrichtung sicherstellen __ Fachliche Fähigkeiten und Erfahrung __ - Mindestens 2–3 Jahre Erfahrung in der operativen Tätigkeit, mit Erfahrung in Koordinationsrollen - Erfahrung im elektromechanischen Bereich - Frühere Erfahrung in Teamkoordinationsrollen ist von Vorteil __ Ausbildung __ - Berufsschulabschluss oder gleichwertig __ Mehr über uns __ ABB Smart Power bietet Lösungen für die Energieverteilung in Rechenzentren, Industrie- und Fertigungsanlagen, kritischen Infrastrukturen und Gewerbegebäuden. Die technischen Teams der Division arbeiten eng mit Industriepartnern zusammen und bieten fortschrittliche Lösungen, die schnelles Wachstum, Energiewende und Nachhaltigkeitsziele unterstützen. Das Portfolio der Division umfasst industrielle Leistungsschalter, Niederspannungssysteme, Motoranwendungen und Sicherheitsvorrichtungen wie Schalter und Relais. Die Power Protection-Einheit unterstützt die weltweit größten Rechenzentrumsunternehmen mit fortschrittlichen energieeffizienten USV-Lösungen. Der ABB Ability™ Energy Manager der Division bietet eine skalierbare, benutzerfreundliche Plattform, die Organisationen hilft, Energie zu sparen und CO2-Emissionen zu reduzieren. Der Rekrutierungsprozess wird von Mara Werne, Talent Partner, geleitet. Der Aufbau einer saubereren, intelligenteren Zukunft erfordert alle Arten von Köpfen: die Neugierigen, die Mutigen und die Kreativen. Deshalb heißen wir Menschen aus allen Hintergründen und Erfahrungen willkommen. Bereit, einen Unterschied zu machen? Bewerben Sie sich noch heute oder besuchen Sie https://www.abb.com, um mehr über die Auswirkungen unserer Lösungen weltweit zu erfahren.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Chez ABB, nous aidons les industries à fonctionner de manière plus efficace et durable—et chaque personne ici contribue à rendre cela possible. Vous serez habilité à diriger, soutenu pour évoluer et fier de l’impact que nous créons ensemble. Rejoignez-nous et aidez à faire fonctionner ce qui fait tourner le monde. Ce poste rapporte à : Superviseur de Production __ Description du poste __ Contribue à garantir un environnement de travail sûr conformément aux directives de l'entreprise, en assurant la réalisation des objectifs de production pendant le poste. Soutient les superviseurs de production dans la coordination quotidienne des activités opérationnelles et fournit une assistance technique aux opérateurs dans les zones d'assemblage et d'emballage. Le modèle de travail pour ce poste est sur site : #LI-Onsite __ Principaux rôles et responsabilités __ - Surveiller et garantir le respect des directives de sécurité ABB et du Code de conduite pendant le poste - Soutenir le superviseur de production / superviseur logistique pour assurer la bonne exécution des activités de production - Fournir un support technique aux opérateurs (Assemblage, Emballage) pendant les opérations quotidiennes - Agir comme point de référence pour la formation sur le terrain du personnel de production - Servir de premier niveau de contact pour les problèmes opérationnels à escalader au superviseur de production concerné - Participer aux cercles de qualité de niveau 1 en collectant les problèmes techniques et de qualité et en les communiquant au superviseur approprié __ Licence d'exploitation / Valeurs fondamentales __ - Veiller à ce que tout le personnel (dans le domaine de responsabilité) comprenne les valeurs fondamentales d'ABB et les normes de sécurité et d'intégrité du groupe, et agisse en conséquence - Mettre en œuvre et garantir le respect du Code de conduite, des outils, des politiques et des processus d'ABB dans la zone assignée __ Collaboration / Leadership __ - Promouvoir et faciliter la collaboration au sein des zones de travail concernées - Gérer les relations avec les parties prenantes dans le domaine de responsabilité et garantir l'alignement __ Compétences professionnelles et expérience __ - Minimum 2–3 ans d'expérience dans les opérations, avec une expérience dans des rôles de coordination - Expérience dans le domaine électromécanique - Une expérience préalable dans des rôles de coordination d'équipe est considérée comme un atout __ Formation __ - Diplôme d'école professionnelle ou équivalent __ En savoir plus sur nous __ ABB Smart Power fournit des solutions de distribution d'énergie pour les centres de données, les usines industrielles et manufacturières, les infrastructures critiques et les bâtiments commerciaux. Les équipes techniques de la division travaillent en étroite collaboration avec des partenaires industriels, offrant des solutions avancées qui soutiennent une croissance rapide, la transition énergétique et les objectifs de durabilité. Le portefeuille de la division comprend des disjoncteurs industriels, des systèmes basse tension, des applications de démarrage moteur et des dispositifs de sécurité tels que des interrupteurs et des relais. Son unité Power Protection soutient les plus grandes entreprises de centres de données au monde avec des solutions UPS avancées et économes en énergie. L'ABB Ability™ Energy Manager de la division offre une plateforme évolutive et facile à utiliser qui aide les organisations à économiser de l'énergie et à réduire les émissions de CO2. Le processus de recrutement est géré par Mara Werne, Talent Partner. Construire un avenir plus propre et plus intelligent nécessite toutes sortes d'esprits : les curieux, les courageux et les créatifs. C'est pourquoi nous accueillons des personnes de tous horizons et expériences. Prêt à faire une différence ? Postulez dès aujourd'hui ou visitez https://www.abb.com pour en savoir plus sur l'impact de nos solutions à travers le monde.

jobs.description: At ABB , we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world. This position reports to: Production Supervisor __ Job Summary Contributes to ensuring a safe working environment in compliance with company guidelines, guaranteeing the achievement of Production targets during the shift. Supports the Production Supervisors in the daily coordination of operational activities, providing technical assistance to operators in the testing areas. Your Roles and Responsibilities - Monitoring and ensuring compliance with ABB safety guidelines and Code of Conduct during the shift - Supporting the Production Supervisor to ensure the correct execution of production activities - Providing technical support to operators (Testing) during daily operations - Acting as the reference point for on‑the‑job training of production personnel - Serving as the first level of contact for operational issues to be escalated to the relevant Production Supervisor - Participating in Level 1 Q Circles: gathers technical and quality issues and communicating them to the appropriate supervisor The work model for this role is on-site: #LI-Onsite License to Operate / Core Values - Ensuring that all personnel (within the area of responsibility) understand ABB’s core values and the group’s safety and integrity standards, and act accordingly - Implementing and ensuring compliance with ABB’s Code of Conduct, tools, policies, and processes within the assigned area Collaboration / Leadership - Promoting and enabling collaboration within the relevant work areas - Managing relationships with stakeholders in the area of responsibility and ensures alignment Professional Skills and Experience - Minimum 2–3 years of experience in operations, with experience in coordination roles - Experience in the electrical/electronic field - Previous experience in team coordination roles is considered a plus Education - Vocational school diploma or equivalent More About Us ABB Smart Power provides energy distribution solutions for data centers, industrial and manufacturing plants, critical infrastructure and commercial buildings. The Division’s technical teams work closely with industry partners, delivering advanced solutions that support rapid growth, energy transition, and sustainability objectives. The Division’s portfolio includes industrial circuit breakers, low-voltage systems, motor starting applications, and safety devices like switches and relays. Its Power Protection unit supports the world’s largest data center companies with advanced energy-efficient UPS solutions. The Division’s ABB Ability™ Energy Manager provides a scalable, easy-to-use platform that helps organizations save energy and reduce CO2 emissions. The recruitment process is managed by Mara Werne, Talent Partner. Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. That's why we welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences. Ready to make an impact? Apply today or visit https://www.abb.com to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

jobs.title: Contract Manager
jobs.description: At ABB , we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world. This position reports to: Global Project Operations Manager __ You are responsible for supporting sales and execution in contract and risks management and ensuring consistent management of all proposals and contracts. Define and deploy the best practices and guidelines to ensure consistent and complete preparation of global risk reviews. Oversight of the contract management process, bidding submission, contract negotiations and document management as required. Key Responsibilities - Responsible jointly with the Sales Responsible to develop project specific contractual strategies, risk assessments and corresponding cost provision considerations. Work with the sales and account management team on Frame Agreements. - Overviews the legal function in reviewing and commenting on the contractual tender terms and conditions and corresponding update of the Risk Review database. Actively participates in Risk Review preparation and meetings. - Support the continuous improvement of the contract and risk management process and other improvements (e.g. rev split agreement, etc.) within the Global Business Line. Develop and maintain contract and risk management training program and contribute to regular Sales Operations Handbook updates. - Support the handover of all relevant contract and risk management aspects from tendering to execution stage. - Participate in project reviews to identify contract and risk management aspects to be addressed and support definition of corresponding mitigation strategies upon request (e.g. notifications, claims, variation orders, etc.). Participate in lessons learned exercises to assess and outline the contract and risk management related improvement areas and to divulgate the improvement actions within the organization. - Support Legal function in handling formal dispute resolution (mediation, litigation or arbitration) as required. - Maintain overview and track all ongoing significant contractual issues and communicate with business partners and management on an ongoing basis. - Be the first point of contact and act as interface between business and corresponding Group or Corporate function to address project related commercial, tax and insurance topics. - Be the first point of contact and act as interface between Integrity functions to address project related integrity Qualifications - Strong expertise in contractual terms, frame agreements, and global risk review policies, with the ability to assess and mitigate contractual and operational risks. - Solid understanding of project management, project execution models, and financial implications (FCM) throughout the project lifecycle. - Proven experience in regulatory compliance, legal frameworks, and the application of both Common and Civil Law in commercial contexts. - Skilled in negotiation and claim management, ensuring effective resolution of commercial issues and protection of business interests. - Knowledge of business strategy, sales processes, account management practices, and engineering project sales channels. - Familiarity with relevant product portfolios and the capability to translate technical offerings into commercially sound contract structures. We empower you to take initiative, challenge ideas, and lead with confidence. You’ll grow through meaningful work, continuous learning, and support that’s tailored to your goals. Every idea you share and every action you take contributes to something bigger. Guide to the future. This is where innovation accelerates, industries are reimagined, and your impact powers the world ahead. Run What Runs the World. #ABBCareers #RunwithABB #Runwhatrunstheworld Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. descriptionByLocale.en: At ABB , we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world. This position reports to: Global Project Operations Manager __ You are responsible for supporting sales and execution in contract and risks management and ensuring consistent management of all proposals and contracts. Define and deploy the best practices and guidelines to ensure consistent and complete preparation of global risk reviews. Oversight of the contract management process, bidding submission, contract negotiations and document management as required. Key Responsibilities - Responsible jointly with the Sales Responsible to develop project specific contractual strategies, risk assessments and corresponding cost provision considerations. Work with the sales and account management team on Frame Agreements. - Overviews the legal function in reviewing and commenting on the contractual tender terms and conditions and corresponding update of the Risk Review database. Actively participates in Risk Review preparation and meetings. - Support the continuous improvement of the contract and risk management process and other improvements (e.g. rev split agreement, etc.) within the Global Business Line. Develop and maintain contract and risk management training program and contribute to regular Sales Operations Handbook updates. - Support the handover of all relevant contract and risk management aspects from tendering to execution stage. - Participate in project reviews to identify contract and risk management aspects to be addressed and support definition of corresponding mitigation strategies upon request (e.g. notifications, claims, variation orders, etc.). Participate in lessons learned exercises to assess and outline the contract and risk management related improvement areas and to divulgate the improvement actions within the organization. - Support Legal function in handling formal dispute resolution (mediation, litigation or arbitration) as required. - Maintain overview and track all ongoing significant contractual issues and communicate with business partners and management on an ongoing basis. - Be the first point of contact and act as interface between business and corresponding Group or Corporate function to address project related commercial, tax and insurance topics. - Be the first point of contact and act as interface between Integrity functions to address project related integrity Qualifications - Strong expertise in contractual terms, frame agreements, and global risk review policies, with the ability to assess and mitigate contractual and operational risks. - Solid understanding of project management, project execution models, and financial implications (FCM) throughout the project lifecycle. - Proven experience in regulatory compliance, legal frameworks, and the application of both Common and Civil Law in commercial contexts. - Skilled in negotiation and claim management, ensuring effective resolution of commercial issues and protection of business interests. - Knowledge of business strategy, sales processes, account management practices, and engineering project sales channels. - Familiarity with relevant product portfolios and the capability to translate technical offerings into commercially sound contract structures. We empower you to take initiative, challenge ideas, and lead with confidence. You’ll grow through meaningful work, continuous learning, and support that’s tailored to your goals. Avrai la possibilità di guidare, sarai supportato nella crescita e sarai orgoglioso dell'impatto che creiamo insieme. Unisciti a noi e aiuta a gestire ciò che muove il mondo. Questa posizione riporta a: Global Project Operations Manager Sei responsabile di supportare le vendite e l'esecuzione nella gestione di contratti e rischi, garantendo una gestione coerente di tutte le proposte e i contratti. Definisci e implementi le migliori pratiche e linee guida per assicurare una preparazione completa e coerente delle revisioni dei rischi globali. Supervisione del processo di gestione dei contratti, presentazione delle offerte, negoziazioni contrattuali e gestione della documentazione, secondo necessità. Responsabilità chiave - Responsabile, insieme al Responsabile Vendite, di sviluppare strategie contrattuali specifiche per progetto, valutazioni dei rischi e relative considerazioni di costo. Lavorare con il team vendite e gestione account sugli Accordi Quadro. - Supervisionare la funzione legale nella revisione e commento dei termini e condizioni delle gare contrattuali e aggiornare il database della Revisione dei Rischi. Partecipare attivamente alla preparazione e alle riunioni della Revisione dei Rischi. - Supportare il miglioramento continuo del processo di gestione dei contratti e dei rischi e altre migliorie (es. accordi di ripartizione dei ricavi, ecc.) all'interno della Business Line Globale. Sviluppare e mantenere il programma di formazione sulla gestione di contratti e rischi e contribuire agli aggiornamenti regolari del Sales Operations Handbook. - Supportare il trasferimento di tutti gli aspetti rilevanti di gestione contratti e rischi dalla fase di gara a quella di esecuzione. - Partecipare alle revisioni di progetto per identificare gli aspetti di gestione contratti e rischi da affrontare e supportare la definizione delle strategie di mitigazione corrispondenti su richiesta (es. notifiche, reclami, ordini di variazione, ecc.). Partecipare alle esercitazioni di lezione apprese per valutare e delineare le aree di miglioramento relative a contratti e rischi e divulgare le azioni di miglioramento all'interno dell'organizzazione. - Supportare la funzione legale nella gestione della risoluzione formale delle controversie (mediazione, contenzioso o arbitrato) secondo necessità. - Mantenere una panoramica e monitorare tutte le questioni contrattuali significative in corso e comunicare con i partner commerciali e la direzione in modo continuo. - Essere il primo punto di contatto e fungere da interfaccia tra il business e le funzioni di Gruppo o Corporate corrispondenti per affrontare temi commerciali, fiscali e assicurativi legati al progetto. - Essere il primo punto di contatto e fungere da interfaccia tra le funzioni di Integrità per affrontare temi di integrità legati al progetto. Qualifiche - Forte esperienza in termini contrattuali, accordi quadro e politiche di revisione dei rischi globali, con capacità di valutare e mitigare rischi contrattuali e operativi. - Solida comprensione della gestione di progetto, dei modelli di esecuzione e delle implicazioni finanziarie (FCM) lungo l'intero ciclo di vita del progetto. - Provata esperienza in conformità normativa, quadri legali e applicazione sia del diritto comune che civile in contesti commerciali. - Competenza nella negoziazione e nella gestione dei reclami, garantendo una risoluzione efficace delle questioni commerciali e la protezione degli interessi aziendali. - Conoscenza della strategia aziendale, dei processi di vendita, delle pratiche di gestione account e dei canali di vendita di progetti ingegneristici. - Familiarità con i portafogli di prodotto pertinenti e capacità di tradurre le offerte tecniche in strutture contrattuali commercialmente solide. - Capacità di supportare le funzioni legali nella risoluzione di controversie formali. - Ottime capacità comunicative e di interfaccia con le funzioni di integrità e corporate. descriptionByLocale.de: Bei ABB helfen wir Industrien, schlanker und sauberer zu arbeiten – und jede Person hier trägt dazu bei. Sie erhalten die Befugnis zu führen, werden bei Ihrer Entwicklung unterstützt und sind stolz auf die gemeinsam geschaffene Wirkung. Werden Sie Teil unseres Teams und helfen Sie, das zu betreiben, was die Welt antreibt. Diese Position berichtet an: Global Project Operations Manager Sie sind verantwortlich für die Unterstützung von Vertrieb und Ausführung im Vertrags- und Risikomanagement und stellen eine konsistente Verwaltung aller Angebote und Verträge sicher. Sie definieren und implementieren Best Practices und Richtlinien, um eine einheitliche und vollständige Vorbereitung globaler Risikobewertungen zu gewährleisten. Aufsicht über den Vertragsmanagementprozess, die Angebotsabgabe, Vertragsverhandlungen und die Dokumentenverwaltung nach Bedarf. Hauptverantwortlichkeiten - Gemeinsam mit dem Vertriebsverantwortlichen entwickeln Sie projektspezifische Vertragsstrategien, Risikobewertungen und entsprechende Kostenüberlegungen. Zusammenarbeit mit dem Vertriebs- und Account‑Management‑Team bei Rahmenvereinbarungen. - Überwachen die Rechtsabteilung bei der Prüfung und Kommentierung der vertraglichen Ausschreibungsbedingungen und aktualisieren die Risikobewertungsdatenbank. Aktive Teilnahme an der Vorbereitung und den Sitzungen der Risikobewertung. - Unterstützen die kontinuierliche Verbesserung des Vertrags‑ und Risikomanagementprozesses sowie weitere Optimierungen (z. B. Rev‑Split‑Vereinbarungen) innerhalb der Global Business Line. Entwickeln und pflegen ein Schulungsprogramm für Vertrags‑ und Risikomanagement und tragen zu regelmäßigen Updates des Sales Operations Handbook bei. - Unterstützen die Übergabe aller relevanten Vertrags‑ und Risikomanagementaspekte von der Ausschreibungs‑ bis zur Ausführungsphase. - Nehmen an Projekt‑Reviews teil, um Vertrags‑ und Risikomanagementaspekte zu identifizieren, und unterstützen bei Bedarf die Definition entsprechender Minderungsstrategien (z. B. Benachrichtigungen, Claims, Änderungsaufträge). Teilnahme an Lessons‑Learned‑Übungen, um Verbesserungsbereiche im Vertrags‑ und Risikomanagement zu bewerten und die Verbesserungsmaßnahmen im Unternehmen zu verbreiten. - Unterstützen die Rechtsabteilung bei der formalen Streitbeilegung (Mediation, Litigation oder Schiedsverfahren) nach Bedarf. - Behalten den Überblick über alle laufenden signifikanten Vertragsfragen und kommunizieren kontinuierlich mit Geschäftspartnern und Management. - Erster Ansprechpartner und Schnittstelle zwischen dem Business und den entsprechenden Group‑ oder Corporate‑Funktionen für projektbezogene kommerzielle, steuerliche und versicherungstechnische Themen. - Erster Ansprechpartner und Schnittstelle zu den Integrity‑Funktionen für projektbezogene Integritätsfragen. Qualifikationen - Tiefgehende Expertise in Vertragsbedingungen, Rahmenvereinbarungen und globalen Risikobewertungsrichtlinien mit der Fähigkeit, vertragliche und operative Risiken zu bewerten und zu mindern. - Solides Verständnis von Projektmanagement, Ausführungsmodellen und finanziellen Auswirkungen (FCM) über den gesamten Projektlebenszyklus. - Nachweisliche Erfahrung in regulatorischer Compliance, rechtlichen Rahmenbedingungen und der Anwendung sowohl des Common Law als auch des Civil Law in kommerziellen Kontexten. - Verhandlungsgeschick und Erfahrung im Claim‑Management, um kommerzielle Probleme effektiv zu lösen und Unternehmensinteressen zu schützen. - Kenntnis von Unternehmensstrategie, Vertriebsprozessen, Account‑Management‑Praxis und Vertriebswegen für Ingenieurprojekte. - Vertrautheit mit relevanten Produktportfolios und die Fähigkeit, technische Angebote in kommerziell fundierte Vertragsstrukturen zu übersetzen. - Fähigkeit, die Rechtsabteilung bei formalen Streitbeilegungen zu unterstützen. - Hervorragende Kommunikations‑ und Schnittstellenfähigkeiten zu Integrity‑ und Corporate‑Funktionen. Wir befähigen Sie, Initiative zu ergreifen, Ideen zu hinterfragen und mit Zuversicht zu führen. Sie wachsen durch sinnvolle Arbeit, kontinuierliches Lernen und maßgeschneiderte Unterstützung für Ihre Ziele. Jede Idee, die Sie teilen, und jede Handlung, die Sie ergreifen, trägt zu etwas Größerem bei. Gestalten Sie die Zukunft. Hier beschleunigt Innovation, Industrien werden neu gedacht und Ihr Einfluss treibt die Welt von morgen an. Run What Runs the World. #ABBCareers #RunwithABB #Runwhatrunstheworld Der Aufbau einer saubereren, intelligenteren Zukunft erfordert alle Arten von Köpfen: die Neugierigen, die Mutigen und die Kreativen. Deshalb begrüßen wir Menschen aus allen Hintergründen und Erfahrungen. Bereit, einen Unterschied zu machen? Bewerben Sie sich noch heute oder besuchen Sie https://www.abb.com, um mehr über die globale Wirkung unserer Lösungen zu erfahren.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Chez ABB, nous aidons les industries à fonctionner de manière plus efficace et plus propre – et chaque personne ici contribue à le rendre possible. Vous serez habilité à diriger, soutenu pour grandir, et fier de l'impact que nous créons ensemble. Rejoignez‑nous et aidez à faire fonctionner ce qui fait tourner le monde. Ce poste relève de : Global Project Operations Manager Vous êtes responsable de soutenir les ventes et l'exécution dans la gestion des contrats et des risques, en assurant une gestion cohérente de toutes les propositions et contrats. Vous définissez et déployez les meilleures pratiques et lignes directrices pour garantir une préparation complète et homogène des revues de risques mondiales. Supervision du processus de gestion des contrats, de la soumission des offres, des négociations contractuelles et de la gestion documentaire selon les besoins. Responsabilités clés - Responsable, conjointement avec le Responsable des Ventes, du développement de stratégies contractuelles spécifiques au projet, des évaluations de risques et des considérations de coûts correspondantes. Travailler avec l'équipe de vente et de gestion de comptes sur les Accords-Cadres. - Surveiller la fonction juridique lors de la révision et des commentaires sur les termes et conditions des appels d'offres contractuels et mettre à jour la base de données de la Revue des Risques. Participation active à la préparation et aux réunions de la Revue des Risques. - Soutenir l'amélioration continue du processus de gestion des contrats et des risques ainsi que d'autres améliorations (par ex. accord de partage de revenus, etc.) au sein de la Global Business Line. Développer et maintenir le programme de formation à la gestion des contrats et des risques et contribuer aux mises à jour régulières du Sales Operations Handbook. - Soutenir le transfert de tous les aspects pertinents de la gestion des contrats et des risques de la phase d'appel d'offres à la phase d'exécution. - Participer aux revues de projet pour identifier les aspects de gestion des contrats et des risques à traiter et soutenir la définition des stratégies d'atténuation correspondantes sur demande (par ex. notifications, réclamations, ordres de variation, etc.). Participer aux exercices de leçons apprises pour évaluer et définir les axes d'amélioration liés aux contrats et aux risques et diffuser les actions d'amélioration au sein de l'organisation. - Soutenir la fonction juridique dans la gestion de la résolution formelle des litiges (médiation, contentieux ou arbitrage) selon les besoins. - Maintenir une vue d'ensemble et suivre toutes les questions contractuelles significatives en cours et communiquer en continu avec les partenaires commerciaux et la direction. - Être le premier point de contact et servir d'interface entre le business et les fonctions de Groupe ou Corporate correspondantes pour aborder les sujets commerciaux, fiscaux et d'assurance liés au projet. - Être le premier point de contact et servir d'interface avec les fonctions d'Intégrité pour aborder les questions d'intégrité liées au projet. Qualifications - Expertise solide en termes contractuels, accords-cadres et politiques de revue des risques mondiaux, avec la capacité d'évaluer et d'atténuer les risques contractuels et opérationnels. - Bonne compréhension de la gestion de projet, des modèles d'exécution et des implications financières (FCM) tout au long du cycle de vie du projet. - Expérience avérée en conformité réglementaire, cadres juridiques et application du Common Law et du Civil Law dans des contextes commerciaux. - Compétences en négociation et gestion des réclamations, assurant une résolution efficace des enjeux commerciaux et la protection des intérêts de l'entreprise. - Connaissance de la stratégie d'entreprise, des processus de vente, des pratiques de gestion de comptes et des canaux de vente de projets d'ingénierie. - Familiarité avec les portefeuilles de produits pertinents et capacité à traduire les offres techniques en structures contractuelles commercialement solides. - Capacité à soutenir les fonctions juridiques dans la résolution formelle des litiges. - Excellentes compétences en communication et en interface avec les fonctions d'Intégrité et Corporate. Nous vous donnons les moyens de prendre des initiatives, de remettre en question les idées et de diriger avec confiance. Vous grandirez grâce à un travail significatif, un apprentissage continu et un soutien adapté à vos objectifs. Chaque idée que vous partagez et chaque action que vous entreprenez contribuent à quelque chose de plus grand. Guidez le futur. Ici, l'innovation s'accélère, les industries sont réinventées, et votre impact alimente le monde de demain. Run What Runs the World. #ABBCareers #RunwithABB #Runwhatrunstheworld Construire un avenir plus propre et plus intelligent nécessite toutes sortes d'esprits : les curieux, les courageux et les créatifs. C’est pourquoi nous accueillons des personnes de tous horizons et expériences. Prêt à avoir un impact ? Postulez dès aujourd’hui ou visitez https://www.abb.com pour en savoir plus sur l’impact de nos solutions à l’échelle mondiale.

jobs.description: At ABB , we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world. This position reports to: Production Supervisor __ Job Summary Contributes to ensuring a safe working environment in compliance with company guidelines, guaranteeing the achievement of Production/Logistics targets during the shift. Supports the Production Supervisors in the daily coordination of operational activities, providing technical assistance to operators in the testing areas. The work model for this role is on-site: #LI-Onsite Main Roles and Responsibilities - Monitoring and ensuring compliance with ABB safety guidelines and Code of Conduct during the shift - Supporting the Production Supervisor to ensure the correct execution of production activities - Providing technical support to testing operators during daily operations - Acting as the reference point for on‑the‑job training of testing personnel - Serving as the first level of contact for operational issues to be escalated to the relevant Production Supervisor - Participating in Level 1 Q Circles: gathering technical and quality issues and communicating them to the appropriate supervisor License to Operate / Core Values - Ensuring that all personnel (within the area of responsibility) understand ABB’s core values and the group’s safety and integrity standards, and acting accordingly - Implementing and ensuring compliance with ABB’s Code of Conduct, tools, policies, and processing within the assigned area Collaboration / Leadership - Promoting and enabling collaboration within the relevant work areas - Managing relationships with stakeholders in the area of responsibility and ensuring alignment Professional Skills and Experience - Minimum 2–3 years of experience in operations, preferably in coordination roles - Experience in the electrical/electronic field - Previous experience in team coordination roles is considered a plus Education - Vocational school diploma or equivalent More About Us ABB Smart Power provides energy distribution solutions for data centers, industrial and manufacturing plants, critical infrastructure and commercial buildings. The Division’s technical teams work closely with industry partners, delivering advanced solutions that support rapid growth, energy transition, and sustainability objectives. The Division’s portfolio includes industrial circuit breakers, low-voltage systems, motor starting applications, and safety devices like switches and relays. Its Power Protection unit supports the world’s largest data center companies with advanced energy-efficient UPS solutions. The Division’s ABB Ability™ Energy Manager provides a scalable, easy-to-use platform that helps organizations save energy and reduce CO2 emissions. The recruitment process is managed by Mara Werne, Talent Partner . Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. That's why we welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences. Ready to make an impact? Apply today or visit https://www.abb.com to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

Sarai autorizzato a guidare, supportato a crescere e orgoglioso dell'impatto che creiamo insieme. Unisciti a noi e aiuta a gestire ciò che fa girare il mondo. Questa posizione riporta a: Production Supervisor Riepilogo del lavoro Contribuisce a garantire un ambiente di lavoro sicuro in conformità con le linee guida aziendali, assicurando il raggiungimento degli obiettivi di Produzione/Logistica durante il turno. Supporta i Production Supervisor nel coordinamento quotidiano delle attività operative, fornendo assistenza tecnica agli operatori nelle aree di collaudo. Il modello di lavoro per questo ruolo è in sede: #LI-Onsite Principali ruoli e responsabilità - Monitorare e garantire la conformità alle linee guida di sicurezza ABB e al Codice di Condotta durante il turno - Supportare il Production Supervisor per assicurare la corretta esecuzione delle attività di produzione - Fornire supporto tecnico agli operatori di collaudo durante le operazioni quotidiane - Agire come punto di riferimento per la formazione on‑the‑job del personale di collaudo - Servire come primo livello di contatto per le problematiche operative da inoltrare al Production Supervisor competente - Partecipare ai Q Circle di Livello 1: raccogliere problemi tecnici e di qualità e comunicarli al supervisore appropriato Licenza Operativa / Valori Fondamentali - Garantire che tutto il personale (nell'area di responsabilità) comprenda i valori fondamentali di ABB e gli standard di sicurezza e integrità del gruppo, agendo di conseguenza - Implementare e garantire la conformità al Codice di Condotta, agli strumenti, alle politiche e ai processi di ABB nell'area assegnata Collaborazione / Leadership - Promuovere e favorire la collaborazione nelle aree di lavoro pertinenti - Gestire le relazioni con gli stakeholder nell'area di responsabilità assicurando l'allineamento Competenze professionali ed esperienza - Minimo 2–3 anni di esperienza in operazioni, preferibilmente in ruoli di coordinamento - Esperienza nel settore elettrico/elettronico - Esperienza pregressa in ruoli di coordinamento del team è considerata un plus Formazione - Diploma di scuola professionale o equivalente Di più su di noi ABB Smart Power fornisce soluzioni di distribuzione energetica per data center, impianti industriali e manifatturieri, infrastrutture critiche e edifici commerciali. I team tecnici della Divisione lavorano a stretto contatto con i partner del settore, offrendo soluzioni avanzate che supportano la rapida crescita, la transizione energetica e gli obiettivi di sostenibilità. Il portafoglio della Divisione comprende interruttori industriali, sistemi a bassa tensione, applicazioni di avviamento motori e dispositivi di sicurezza come interruttori e relè. jobs.description: At ABB , we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world. This position reports to: Quality Manager __ Il tuo ruolo e le tue responsabilità: In questo ruolo, contribuirai all'implementazione della nostra strategia di qualità in tutta l'unità organizzativa locale, promuovendo una forte cultura della qualità e implementando sistemi efficaci, strumenti e team qualificati, tutti incentrati sul superamento delle aspettative dei clienti e sul mantenimento di operazioni sostenibili. Ogni giorno, bilancerai prevenzione, miglioramento continuo e risposta rapida alle sfide di qualità, collaborando con team interfunzionali per migliorare i risultati di qualità. Il tuo lavoro supporterà direttamente l'unità organizzativa nel raggiungimento degli obiettivi di performance e nel progresso verso standard di livello mondiale. Il modello di lavoro per questo ruolo è in sede: #LI-Onsite #Work-Shifts Questo ruolo contribuisce alla divisione Critical Power, Smart Power presso Quartino, Svizzera. Sarai principalmente responsabile di: - Supportare attivamente le linee di produzione come primo punto di contatto per le questioni relative alla qualità. - Tracciare e registrare sistematicamente tutte le non conformità generate dalle linee di produzione. - Contribuire al miglioramento degli indicatori chiave di qualità, principalmente il First Pass Yield (FPY) e il costo complessivo della scarsa qualità (COPQ). - Segnalare tempestivamente e accuratamente le non conformità al fornitore. - Controllare, implementare e migliorare continuamente i controlli di qualità per migliorare la qualità dei prodotti e il controllo dei processi. - Gestire il magazzino dei prodotti non conformi e lavorare attivamente per ridurre i livelli di inventario. Requisiti per il ruolo: - Tecnico meccanico o elettrico o settore correlato. - Minimo 2 anni di esperienza in ruoli relativi alla qualità o equivalenti. - Profonda conoscenza dei processi di qualità, comprese le metodologie di risoluzione dei problemi e gli strumenti di miglioramento continuo. - Capacità comunicative e interpersonali con la capacità di lavorare efficacemente con gli stakeholder a tutti i livelli organizzativi. - Disponibilità a lavorare su turni e oltre l'orario standard quando richiesto, e capacità di lavorare in modo efficiente in situazioni impegnative. - La lingua principale è l'italiano, scritto e parlato. - La conoscenza dell'inglese è considerata un vantaggio. Maggiori informazioni su di noi ABB Smart Power fornisce soluzioni di distribuzione dell'energia per data center, impianti di produzione, infrastrutture critiche ed edifici commerciali. I team tecnici della Divisione lavorare a stretto contatto con i partner del settore, fornendo soluzioni avanzate che supportano la rapida crescita, transizione e gli obiettivi di sostenibilità. Il portafoglio della Divisione comprende interruttori industriali, sistemi a bassa tensione, applicazioni di avviamento motore e dispositivi di sicurezza come interruttori e relè. La sua unità Power Protection supporta le più grandi aziende di data center del mondo con soluzioni UPS avanzate ed efficienti dal punto di vista energetico. ABB Ability™ Energy Manager della Divisione fornisce una piattaforma scalabile e facile da usare che aiuta le organizzazioni a risparmiare energia e ridurre le emissioni di CO2. Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. That's why we welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences. Ready to make an impact? Apply today or visit https://www.abb.com to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

descriptionByLocale.en: At ABB, we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world. This position reports to: Quality Manager Your role and responsibilities: In this role, you will contribute to the implementation of our quality strategy across the local organizational unit, promoting a strong quality culture and implementing effective systems, tools and qualified teams, all focused on exceeding customer expectations and maintaining sustainable operations. Every day, you will balance prevention, continuous improvement and rapid response to quality challenges, collaborating with cross‑functional teams to improve quality outcomes. Your work will directly support the organizational unit in achieving performance goals and progressing towards world‑class standards. The work model for this role is on‑site: #LI-Onsite #Work-Shifts This role contributes to the Critical Power, Smart Power division at Quartino, Switzerland. You will be primarily responsible for: - Actively support production lines as the first point of contact for quality‑related issues. - Systematically track and record all non‑conformities generated by the production lines. - Contribute to improving key quality indicators, mainly First Pass Yield (FPY) and Cost of Poor Quality (COPQ). - Promptly and accurately report non‑conformities to the supplier. - Control, implement and continuously improve quality checks to enhance product quality and process control. - Manage the inventory of non‑conforming products and work actively to reduce inventory levels. Requirements for the role: - Mechanical or electrical technician or related field. - Minimum 2 years of experience in quality‑related roles or equivalent. - Deep knowledge of quality processes, including problem‑solving methodologies and continuous improvement tools. - Communication and interpersonal skills with the ability to work effectively with stakeholders at all organizational levels. - Availability to work shifts and beyond standard hours when required, and ability to work efficiently in demanding situations. - Primary language is Italian, written and spoken. - Knowledge of English is considered an advantage. More information about us: ABB Smart Power provides energy distribution solutions for data centers, manufacturing plants, critical infrastructures and commercial buildings. The technical teams of the Division work closely with industry partners, delivering advanced solutions that support rapid growth, transition and sustainability goals. The Division’s portfolio includes industrial switches, low‑voltage systems, motor‑starting applications and safety devices such as circuit breakers and relays. Its Power Protection unit supports the world’s largest data‑center companies with advanced, energy‑efficient UPS solutions. ABB Ability™ Energy Manager of the Division provides a scalable, easy‑to‑use platform that helps organisations save energy and reduce CO₂ emissions. jobs.title: (80 - 100 %) Scrum Master
jobs.description: At ABB , we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world. This position reports to: Scrum Master Chapter Leader __ Electrification provides leading electrical distribution and management technologies, solutions and services to electrify the world in a safe, smart and sustainable way. The portfolio includes medium- and low-voltage electrical components, switchgear, digital devices, enclosures, and circuit breakers, among others. With our products, solutions and services, we collaborate with customers to improve power delivery and security, enhance energy management, efficiency and operational reliability, as we seek to achieve a low carbon society. go.abb/electrification. In this role you will be part in pioneering a new way of working within our Smart Power Division. You will implement and lead the Agile practices at team level for one or more teams. You will guide on the Agile principles, helping the team to achieve valuable outcomes, and identify continuous improvement, bringing a data driven approach in day-to-day management. The work model for the role is: hybrid #LI-hybrid You will be mainly accountable for: - Guide and coach Scrum teams in applying Agile practices and principles, fostering positive team dynamics, collaboration, and continuous improvement - Develop high‑performing teams by identifying strengths and areas for growth, using effective coaching techniques, and promoting empowering Agile behaviors - Facilitate key Scrum event s (Sprint Planning, Daily Scrum, Sprint Review, Sprint Retrospective) to ensure engagement, transparency, and smooth delivery - Strengthen Agile maturity across the organization by building cross-team alliances, improving Agile practices, and ensuring adherence to Scrum theory, practices, and guidelines Qualifications for the role: - Bachelor’s Degree or equivalent (this position is not embedded in the IT environment; we are open for profiles with different backgrounds like psychology, social science, engineering, business administration, economics etc.) - 5 or more years of e xperience as Scrum Master or in a similar Agile role applying Agile principles and practices is an advantage - Fluent command of English with Italian considered as additional advantage - Motivated to work in an Agile, dynamic workplace and cross functional team - Experience in leading people with the ability to earn trust while challenging the team to improve and operate outside its comfort zone - Strong creative problem – solving skills and the ability to get things done - Excellent communication, facilitation, negotiation, coaching, risk management and conflict-resolution skills, with the ability to foster positive team dynamics and collaboration Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. That's why we welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences. Ready to make an impact? Apply today or visit https://www.abb.com to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.
